markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, use case guides, and integration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Use Case Guides Paused:** Production is paused to implement feedback, primarily adding JSON examples to show data transformation between Webflow and integrations. This is a pre-publication requirement to make the guides actionable.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**Integration Page Strategy:** With production nearly complete, the focus shifts to optimization. The initial plan is to analyze SEO performance (using unpacked Search Console data) to prioritize pages for CRO and content improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [**Category Refresh Blocked:** The planned refresh is blocked pending a 301 redirect strategy. This is critical to preserve SEO value from old URLs, which will be lost otherwise.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [**Developer Hub Vision:** GrowthX will draft a vision for a cohesive developer hub, integrating content streams like the blog and code components into a single destination.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)

## Topics

### Use Case Guides: Feedback & Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Current guides lack the technical detail needed to be actionable for developers.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**Solution:** Add JSON examples showing data transformation between an integration's API and Webflow's CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This provides a concrete understanding of the work involved without requiring full code snippets.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [**Content Scope:** Remove repetitive, generic advice (e.g., testing, rate limits) to make room for more valuable technical content.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [**Publication Bar:** The new JSON examples are a pre-publication requirement.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The guides must provide confidence in the implementation process to be valuable.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
      - [**Metrics:** Success will be measured anecdotally (e.g., sales engineering feedback), not by traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [**Workflow Improvement:** Explore using a RAG system with a single source of truth (e.g., Webflow's `developer.webflow.com` subdomain) to improve AI-generated content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)

### Integration Pages: Optimization Strategy

  - [**Context:** With \~200 pages left to produce, the focus shifts from production to optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [**Initial Analysis:** A review of top-performing pages (via Search Console) will inform optimization priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
      - [**Clarification:** The average position metric (e.g., "12" for Google Tag Manager) is misleading. It averages performance across all keywords, including non-branded ones where the page may rank lower.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [**Action:** Unpack this data to see performance for specific keywords (e.g., "Webflow Google Tag Manager integration" vs. "Google Tag Manager integration").](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [**Optimization Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [CRO best practices](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [Improved positioning](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [More detailed FAQs for search](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

### Category Refresh: Blocked

  - [**Plan:** Reorganize integration categories and update URLs (e.g., `.../integration-type/x` → `.../assets/x`).](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [**Blocker:** The refresh is on hold pending a 301 redirect strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is critical to preserve SEO value from the old URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [**Action:** Colin will consult Vivian (SEO) to confirm the redirect process.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)

### Developer Hub: Vision

  - [**Goal:** Create a cohesive developer hub that ties together all developer-focused content streams.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [**Scope:** This is a broader vision than the initial blog page suggestions.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will draft a proposal outlining this "dream state" vision for review.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)

### GrowthX Team & QBR

  - [**Team Model:** GrowthX is shifting to a project-based model, pulling in specialized experts (e.g., Kathy for dev marketing, Kirk for AI workflows) as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [**QBR:** The next quarterly business review is planned for mid-January.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Holiday Break:** This meeting is paused for the last two weeks of December.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
      - [Pause use case guide production.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
      - [Group Raymond's feedback into themes (pre-publication vs. V2) for Colin's review.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
      - [Draft a proposal for the Developer Hub vision.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
      - [Check the code components sample site for missing components.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [**Colin:**](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
      - [Consult Vivian (SEO) on the 301 redirect process for the category refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [**Webflow & GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
      - [Confirm the 301 redirect plan before proceeding with the category refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4d1mqZBo9ygVWh1sZdCme1_nxcVMJq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
